name: S3 Admin (Floci-wired)
description: A web GUI to browse, upload and download S3 buckets and objects — pre-wired to the Floci (LocalStack) S3 endpoint on port 4566. Test your S3 workflows locally exactly as they will run against real Amazon S3.

aws.parity: Browses the very same buckets and objects locally (via the Floci endpoint on 4566) that you will see in the S3 console — same API, same presigned URLs.
aws.deploy: Already Floci-wired: set S3_ENDPOINT to your real regional S3 endpoint (or drop it) to point the browser at production S3.

variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the S3 Admin web UI.

variables.label: S3 Endpoint
variables.description: Host:port of the S3 endpoint. Defaults to Floci (LocalStack) on port 4566.

variables.label: AWS Region
variables.description: AWS region used when connecting to S3.
